profile.headline: Senior Data Engineer | Analytics Leader | Cloud Architect
profile.summary: Results-driven data engineering leader with 10+ years of experience designing and implementing large-scale data platforms. Proven track record of building high-performance data pipelines, leading cross-functional teams, and driving data-informed decision-making across Fortune 500 organizations. Expert in Databricks, Spark, AWS, and modern data stack technologies.

work_experience.title: Senior Data Engineer
work_experience.description: Lead the data platform team building next-generation analytics infrastructure on Databricks and AWS.

highlights.description: Architected and deployed a unified data lakehouse on Databricks serving 500+ analysts, reducing query latency by 70%
Led migration of 200+ legacy ETL pipelines to Delta Live Tables, improving data freshness from 24hrs to 15min
Managed a team of 5 data engineers, implementing agile practices and reducing deployment cycle time by 60%
Implemented Unity Catalog governance framework across 3 business units, ensuring GDPR and SOC2 compliance

work_experience.title: Data Engineer
work_experience.description: Built and maintained real-time data pipelines for trading analytics and risk management platforms.

highlights.description: Designed real-time streaming pipeline processing 2M+ events/sec using Spark Structured Streaming and Kafka
Built ML feature store serving 50+ models, reducing feature engineering time by 80%
Reduced cloud infrastructure costs by $500K/year through optimization of Spark cluster configurations

work_experience.title: Junior Data Engineer
work_experience.description: First data hire responsible for building the company's data infrastructure from scratch.

highlights.description: Built the entire data warehouse from scratch using AWS Redshift and Airflow, enabling the company's first self-service analytics
Created customer 360 data model that drove a 25% increase in customer retention

education.relevant_coursework: Distributed Systems, Machine Learning, Database Systems, Statistical Methods
Data Structures, Algorithms, Linear Algebra, Probability & Statistics

projects.name: Enterprise Data Lakehouse Platform
projects.description: Designed and implemented a multi-tenant data lakehouse on Databricks serving the entire organization's analytics needs.
projects.technologies: Databricks, Delta Lake, Unity Catalog, Terraform, AWS S3, Spark
projects.impact: Consolidated 5 disparate data systems into one platform, saving $2M annually

projects.name: Real-time Fraud Detection Pipeline
projects.description: Built a real-time streaming pipeline for detecting fraudulent transactions using ML models.
projects.technologies: Spark Streaming, Kafka, MLflow, Delta Lake, Python
projects.impact: Reduced fraud losses by 40%, processing 2M+ transactions per second with <100ms latency

projects.name: Customer 360 Analytics Platform
projects.description: Created a unified customer data model integrating data from 15+ sources for a holistic customer view.
projects.technologies: AWS Redshift, Airflow, Python, dbt, Looker
projects.impact: Enabled personalized marketing campaigns that increased customer retention by 25%

publications.title: Building Scalable Data Lakehouses: Lessons from the Trenches
